query: SELECT id, liverId, streamerName, livestreamDate, salesAmount, gmv FROM brand_livestreams WHERE streamerName LIKE '%三宅%' OR streamerName LIKE '%あゆみ%' OR streamerName LIKE '%Sannana%' ORDER BY livestreamDate DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute SELECT id, liverId, streamerName, livestreamDate, salesAmount, gmv FROM brand_livestreams WHERE streamerName LIKE '%三宅%' OR streamerName LIKE '%あゆみ%' OR streamerName LIKE '%Sannana%' ORDER BY livestreamDate DESC LIMIT 20;
